title: Onboarding -  Permission for location tracking accepted [Android]
scenario: Location permission granted during onboarding does not persist for FindMyDevice feature on Poly Lens app
steps: Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app for the first time
Accept the License Agreement and Privacy Policy
In the pop-up window, tap "Allow" to grant location tracking permission
expected: Location tracking is allowed for the Poly Lens app. The user proceeds to further onboarding steps. When the user later accesses the FindMyDevice menu, the app should not prompt for location permissions again.
